title: premna corymbosa var. sambucina
intro: Premna corymbosa var. sambucina, also known as the Sambac Premna, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its aromatic and fragrant leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Premna corymbosa var. sambucina include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to treat wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
